pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 17 to 21 to target the new JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: The project will not compile or run correctly on JDK 21 if the source/target compatibility remains at 17, potentially missing new language features or causing runtime mismatches.

pom.xml.general_idea: Rename springdoc artifact from springdoc-openapi-webflux-ui to springdoc-openapi-starter-webflux-ui to match the new 2.x naming convention.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact ID does not exist in the 2.x series; using it will cause a dependency resolution failure.
